calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-21-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-25-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Lewis Gillian, #11288.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff, State Farm Mutual Automobile Ins. Co.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Adrian Mylan Gordon and Aminollah Majlessi, aka Amin Majlessi.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $28,945.16
Pre-Judgment Interest at the annual rate of 7%: $693.75
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $1,055.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $30,693.91

7. Other (specify): Pursuant to CVC 17151 and 17155, the judgment against AMINOLLAH MAJLESSI, AKA AMIN MAJLESSI is enforceable only to the extent of the minimum insurance requirements at the time of the accident wich were $5,000.00 for property and $15,000.00 per person to a maximum of $30,000.00 for personal injuries. In this case $5,000.00 is the amount enforceable against AMINOLLAH MAJLESSI, AKA AMIN MAJLESSI.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
